Management Commands Documentation¶

This section documents the Django management commands in the news application.

Management Commands¶

Management command to create sample data for testing.

class news.management.commands.create_sample_data.Command(stdout=None, stderr=None, no_color=False, force_color=False)[source]¶

Bases: BaseCommand

Command to create sample data for testing.

help = 'Create sample data for testing'¶
handle(*args, **options)[source]¶

Create sample data.

Create Sample Data Command¶

class news.management.commands.create_sample_data.Command(stdout=None, stderr=None, no_color=False, force_color=False)[source]¶

Bases: BaseCommand

Command to create sample data for testing.

help = 'Create sample data for testing'¶
handle(*args, **options)[source]¶

Create sample data.

Setup Groups Command¶

Management command to set up user groups and permissions.

class news.management.commands.setup_groups.Command(stdout=None, stderr=None, no_color=False, force_color=False)[source]¶

Bases: BaseCommand

Command to create user groups with appropriate permissions.

help = 'Create user groups and assign permissions'¶
handle(*args, **options)[source]¶

Create groups and assign permissions.

class news.management.commands.setup_groups.Command(stdout=None, stderr=None, no_color=False, force_color=False)[source]¶

Bases: BaseCommand

Command to create user groups with appropriate permissions.

help = 'Create user groups and assign permissions'¶
handle(*args, **options)[source]¶

Create groups and assign permissions.
